mapper.select: SELECT i.*, vou.voucher_nm AS voucher_nm, ord.member_nm AS order_nm, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, cd_vis.code_label AS voucher_issue_status_cd_nm FROM pm_voucher_issue i LEFT JOIN pm_voucher vou ON vou.voucher_id = i.voucher_id LEFT JOIN od_order ord ON ord.order_id = i.order_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_vis ON cd_vis.code_grp = 'VOUCHER_ISSUE_STATUS' AND cd_vis.code_value = i.voucher_issue_status_cd WHERE i.voucher_issue_id = #{id}
